title: Kable Kontrol Natural White Cable Ties, 100 mm x 2.5 mm, Pack of 1000, 4" Premium Nylon Zip Ties, Multi-Purpose Plastic Tie Wraps, Secure Self-Locking Mechanism, for Home, Garden, Office and DIY
features: NYLON CABLE TIES (1000 PACK): 100 mm x 2.5 mm multipurpose natural white coloured nylon cable ties made from tough, durable nylon polyamide 6-6, offering a reliable solution for both DIY and professional tasks. Available in a variety of colours, lengths, and widths to suit any project requirement.

SELF-LOCKING MECHANISM: Easy-to-use self-locking mechanism in our zip ties ensures a secure and dependable hold. Simply pull to the required length and the plastic teeth will firmly lock the tie in position.

VERSATILE USE: These 100 mm cable ties offer excellent versatility, suitable for everything from DIY tasks to professional and commercial use. Typical applications of coloured cable ties include organising office cables, securing items during transport, and bundling wires and cables and DIY projects in homes and offices.

DURABLE & WEATHERPROOF: Our cable ties are engineered for durability, capable of withstanding harsh conditions with an operating temperature range from -40℃ to 85℃ (-40℉ to 185℉). They maintain performance across all seasons, resisting brittleness in cold and weakening in heat.

INDUSTRIAL CABLE TIES: Our cable ties have a tensile strength of 8.2 kg ( 18 lbs) which provides a robust and durable solution and makes these cable ties a DIY toolkit essential for major projects or quick fixes. These zip ties are RoHS Compliant meeting military and federal grade specifications.
description: Product Description PRODUCT DESCRIPTION Kable Kontrol’s Heavy Duty Natural White cable ties offer a durable, high-quality, and cost-effective solution for indoor wire bundling and securing objects. Often referred to as white zip ties, these ties are made from natural nylon and are not transparent or see-through. Designed for indoor and in-wall applications, they meet industry standards for low smoke production, making them suitable for safe use in sensitive environments. These heavy-duty natural are RoHS compliant, and meet military and federal grade standards, ensuring reliable and high-performance use. Ideal for a variety of DIY, electrical, and office organisation tasks, they provide dependable performance in a range of settings.
